title: Best Actress in a Musical or Comedy - Golden Globe Predictions & Odds
text: Best Actress in a Musical or Comedy - Golden Globe Predictions & Odds. Closing Odds (as of January 11, 2026, 7 p.m. ET): Rose Byrne for 'If I Had Legs I'd Kick You' at -500 odds (83.33% implied probability); Emma Stone for 'Bugonia' at +1000 (9.09%); Amanda Seyfried for 'The Testament of Ann Lee' at +1100 (8.33%); Chase Infiniti for 'One Battle After Another' at +1900 (5.00%); Cynthia Erivo for 'Wicked: For Good' at +2200 (4.35%); Kate Hudson for 'Song Sung Blue' at +3000 (3.23%). Analyst Prediction: The article's author selected Rose Byrne as the favorite, noting that 'Byrne was just that damned good' with 'easily the best performance of her career.' Actual Result: Rose Byrne won the award, though she expressed surprise at her victory.
